title: Access Tokens
description: Manage access tokens for API authentication

descriptions.name: Descriptive name to identify this access token
descriptions.scopes: Select the permissions this token will have access to

messages.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to {{action}} access tokens

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters

deleteDialog.title: Delete Access Token
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the token "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete Selected Tokens
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected token? This action cannot be undone.
bulkDeleteDialog.description_plural: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected tokens? This action cannot be undone.

descriptions.tokenId: Unique identifier for this access token
descriptions.tokenUsage: Use this token in the Authorization header: Authorization: Bearer {token}...
descriptions.scopes: Permissions that this token has access to

security.title: Important - Security
tips: Never expose the access token in client-side code or public repositories
Use HTTPS in production for all API communications
Regenerate the token if you suspect it has been compromised
Store tokens securely using environment variables or secure vaults

empty.title: No tokens found
empty.description: Create your first access token to start using the API

permissions.loadError: Failed to load permissions. Please try again.
